name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 applications/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 applications/month, missing information causes processing delays. We automate claims processing instead of manual review of applications by adjusters.
problem_solved: Missing information in insurance applications leads to processing delays.
